items.name: Zoe Urban Set - Sneakers
items.description:
Join our Community: https://www.roblox.com/groups/969306563

Part of the Zoe Urban Set. Layered Clothing platform sneakers (Buffalo-style).
Style: chunky yellow sole with navy paneling and cut-outs; street silhouette.
Fit: works with baggy/straight legs; clean ankle wrap to reduce clipping.
Pairs with: LC Top + Baggy Pants.
